title: Vitamin B12 in pregnancy
excerpt: Role in nerves and blood cells, animal and fortified plant sources, and essential supplementation on vegan diets.
content:
## Role

B12 works with folate for DNA synthesis and nervous system health. Deficiency can cause anemia and neurological harm.

## Sources

Meat, fish, eggs, dairy; fortified plant milks and nutritional yeast for vegetarians.

## Important point

Vegans need reliable **B12 supplement** throughout pregnancy and breastfeeding — diet alone is often insufficient.

Check prenatal labels; blood tests if deficiency is suspected.
